title: logania crassifolia
intro: Logania crassifolia, also known as the rough-leaved logania, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Logania crassifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Logania crassifolia can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using a combination of the plant's leaves and roots in a tincture or capsule form.
